$comment: Hand-authored events for the Russia-Ukraine eastern_europe scenario. Timestamps use offset_hours relative to export time so the demo always feels fresh. Weights are signed in [-1, 1]; sign is from the perspective of the de-facto controller of the region (UA for UA-held oblasts, RU for occupied territories). See docs/intel.md.

events.headline: Drone wave intercepted over Kyiv overnight
events.snippet: Air Force reports 38 of 41 Shahed-136 drones downed; debris damaged a substation in the Solomianskyi district.

events.headline: Rada extends martial law and mobilisation by 90 days
events.snippet: Vote 327-3; opposition factions joined the coalition in approving the extension.

events.headline: Anti-corruption arrests at Defence Procurement Agency
events.snippet: NABU detained two senior officials over inflated drone-component contracts.

events.headline: Crowds line Khreshchatyk for fallen-soldiers procession
events.snippet: Estimated 60,000 attended the public funeral procession; mood subdued, defiant.

events.headline: Hryvnia weakens 1.6% on aid uncertainty
events.snippet: NBU intervened on the spot market after a US tranche delay headline.

events.headline: Glide-bomb strike on Vovchansk industrial site
events.snippet: Two FAB-1500 hits reported; oblast administration confirms civilian casualties.

events.headline: Russian assault near Lyptsi repulsed
events.snippet: 57th Mech Bde claims six AFV kills; OSINT confirms three.

events.headline: Kharkiv residents stage rooftop drone-spotting vigils
events.snippet: Civic group coordinates volunteer air-watch teams around residential blocks.

events.headline: Power deficit forces 8-hour blackout schedules
events.snippet: Repeated S-300 strikes on Kharkiv-2 substation; emergency works ongoing.

events.headline: Patriot battery deployment confirmed near city
events.snippet: Air Force statement; senior commanders cite fewer ballistic-missile strikes.

events.headline: Heavy fighting reported in Chasiv Yar microdistrict
events.snippet: ISW notes Russian advance along Stupky neighbourhood; UA defenders consolidate west.

events.headline: Russian armoured assault destroyed near Pokrovsk
events.snippet: 47th Mech Bde geolocated 14 vehicle hulks across a single field.

events.headline: Glide-bomb damage to Toretsk hospital
events.snippet: Three confirmed dead; oblast head calls for civilian evacuations.

events.headline: Mariupol diaspora protests in Lviv on city anniversary
events.snippet: Crowd of 4,000 in central Lviv mark the city's symbolic resistance day.

events.headline: Volunteer brigade recruitment exceeds quota
events.snippet: Azov-12 reports oversubscribed sign-ups for new battalion stand-up.

events.headline: ATACMS strike on Luhansk military airfield
events.snippet: Open-source imagery shows damaged hardstand and two ammunition fires.

events.headline: Occupation 'governor' issues new mobilisation decree
events.snippet: Decree widens age band; reports of refusals on Telegram channels.

events.headline: Sanctions tighten on occupation banking workarounds
events.snippet: OFAC adds two Luhansk-based shell entities to designations.

events.headline: Severodonetsk rail bridge struck
events.snippet: GUR claims credit; rail traffic disrupted for 36 hours.

events.headline: Robotyne salient under Russian probing attacks
events.snippet: 82nd Air Assault Bde reports two repulsed company-strength assaults.

events.headline: Strike on Berdyansk airfield reported
events.snippet: Long-range UAV strike geolocated; secondary detonations recorded.

events.headline: ZNPP cooling-pond level at lowest since reactor shutdown
events.snippet: IAEA flags concerns over cooling water margin at occupied plant.

events.headline: Tokmak partisan leaflets reported in city centre
events.snippet: Local residents post photos of resistance leaflets near rail station.

events.headline: FPV drone wave on Kherson left bank crossings
events.snippet: Brigade claims dozens of small-boat denials over 24 hours.

events.headline: Kherson residents demand stronger AD coverage
events.snippet: Petition with 12,000 signatures handed to oblast administration.

events.headline: Grain depot loss to Russian shelling
events.snippet: Significant 2025 stocks destroyed; insurers re-pricing routes.

events.headline: Cruise-missile strike on Pivdennyi port infrastructure
events.snippet: Two Kalibr impacts on grain terminal; one casualty reported.

events.headline: Naval drone unit announces upgraded Magura-V7 variant
events.snippet: GUR-13 cited longer range and dual-warhead options.

events.headline: Black Sea insurance premia spike after BSF posture
events.snippet: Lloyd's List reports double-digit jump on Odesa-bound hulls.

events.headline: Storm Shadow strike near Saki airfield
events.snippet: Multiple impacts on hardstand; satellite imagery shows two destroyed Su-30s.

events.headline: Black Sea Fleet ship ATACMS-damaged in Sevastopol
events.snippet: Ropucha-class LST reported listing; OSINT confirms drone-spotted hit.

events.headline: Crimean rail freight redirected to Kerch bridge
events.snippet: Rail authority cites increased throughput pressure on bridge.

events.headline: Occupation administration shake-up after FSB probe
events.snippet: Two deputies replaced after corruption indictments leaked online.

events.headline: Crimean Tatar diaspora vigil in Istanbul
events.snippet: Quiet but well-attended event marking deportation anniversary.

events.headline: Cross-border shelling on Sumy outskirts
events.snippet: Two civilian casualties; oblast head calls for stronger AD.

events.headline: TerDef brigade graduates new training cohort
events.snippet: Sumy 117th TerDef Bde reports 800 personnel completed certification.

events.headline: FAB-500 hits Sumy district hospital wing
events.snippet: Building partially collapsed; rescue ongoing; civilian deaths.

events.headline: Drone activity over Chernihiv reservoir overnight
events.snippet: Air Force reports 11 of 13 Shahed downed; one civilian wounded.

events.headline: Memorial unveiled to 2022 defenders
events.snippet: Public ceremony with battle veterans; mood reflective, resolute.

events.headline: Geolocated UA HIMARS strike on Donetsk depot
events.snippet: Multiple secondary detonations; ammunition stockpile assessed destroyed.

events.headline: Occupation security service detains local journalists
events.snippet: Three independent reporters detained; media-rights groups protest.

events.headline: Sevastopol harbour drone-boat probe at dawn
events.snippet: Multiple Magura-V5 reported entering harbour; results unclear.

events.headline: Tourism bookings down 60% YoY
events.snippet: Local industry body cites missile strikes and Western advisories.

events.headline: ATACMS strikes near Berdyansk rail yard
events.snippet: Open-source imagery confirms damage; rail-flow impact for 24h.

events.headline: Partisan-attributed leaflets in Melitopol
events.snippet: Local Telegram channels share photos; FSB sweep reported.

events.headline: Allied tranche of long-range munitions confirmed
events.snippet: Joint statement notes accelerated delivery of GLSDB and ATACMS.

events.headline: Energy ministry warns winter blackouts likely without rapid repairs
events.snippet: Substation losses cited; emergency procurement under way.

events.headline: Public approval of armed forces holds at 95%
events.snippet: KIIS poll; confidence in leadership tracks national mood.
